title: structlint configuration
description: Schema for .structlint.yaml, .structlint.yml, and .structlint.json — validates directory structure and file naming rules for a project.

$schema.description: Reserved for JSON configs that reference this schema directly. YAML users should use the yaml-language-server modeline instead.

extends.description: Config chain. Each entry is a built-in preset name (go-standard, node-standard, python-standard, generic) or a filesystem path relative to this file. Parents are resolved first; child overlays on top with string-slice dedup and by-id replacement for placement/requiredGroups/boundaries. Depth cap 10; cycles detected. REQUIRES structlint >= v0.6.0 (older binaries strict-fail on this key).

dir_structure.description: Rules for which directories are allowed, disallowed, or required.

allowedPaths.description: Glob patterns for directories that ARE allowed. Use `.` for the root and `dir/**` to include subtrees.

disallowedPaths.description: Glob patterns for directories that are NOT allowed. Matches produce violations.

requiredPaths.description: Directories that MUST exist. Simple names, not globs.

file_naming_pattern.description: Rules for which file names are allowed, disallowed, or required.

allowed.description: Glob patterns for allowed files (basename OR relative path).

required.description: At least one file matching each pattern must exist somewhere in the tree.

ignore.description: Path patterns to skip entirely during validation (e.g., .git, node_modules, vendor).

placement.description: Rules that force matching files to live under specific directories.

id.description: Stable rule id; appears in violations and used by suggest/baseline.

files.description: Glob patterns for files this rule applies to.

mustBeUnder.description: One of these directory globs must contain the file.

oneOf.description: At least one of these files must exist somewhere.

eachDirMatching.description: Glob for directories the rule applies to (e.g., cmd/*).

mustContain.description: Files that MUST exist inside each matching directory.

mustContainOneOf.description: At least one of these files must exist inside each matching directory.

requireMatch.description: When true, fail if eachDirMatching matches no directories at all.

boundaries.description: Import-boundary rules for Go, JavaScript/TypeScript, and Python source files.

from.description: Glob for the source-file relative paths this rule applies to.

cannotImport.description: Import globs the source files are forbidden from importing.

severity.description: Rule severity. Defaults to error when omitted.
